notes: Town of Canton Zoning By-Laws; §3.1 Use Regulations Table = Attachment A (current 'TABLE OF USE REGULATIONS 2026', town.canton.ma.us DocumentCenter/View/13244). Assessor codes were NUMERIC (11/12/9/10/3/7/6/5/1) -> MAPC layer 2 strip 50-prefix decodes them spatially to SRA/SRAA/SRB/SRC/GR/B/I/LI/POS. SCHEME NOTE: MAPC reflects pre-2026 scheme (SRA/SRAA/SRB/SRC single-residence variants, single LI); the 2026 recodification consolidated single-residence to 'SR' and split LI into LI/LI(B)/LI(C) + added CB. For the 4 storage/industrial uses the 2026 table's LI/LI(B)/LI(C)/I columns are consistent (li by-right, warehouse=BA), and all SR-variants/GR/B/CB/POS prohibit them, so MAPC's codes map to robust verdicts.
